name: Pasta Salad with Artichoke Hearts & Sprouts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta until al dente.
2. Rinse with cool water.
3. Drain and place in a mixing bowl.
4. Chop the artichokes into bite-sized pieces.
5. Add to the pasta.
6. Add the sprouts and the rest of the ingredients.
7. Mix well.
8. Allow to stand at room temperature or in the fridge for 2 hours.
